When people fall in love with a brand story, [55%](https://www.marketsmiths.com/2017/roi-brand-story/) are more likely to buy the product in the future, 44% will share the story, and 15% might even buy the product immediately.

Take inspiration from successful campaigns, like L'Oreal Paris' " [Lesson of Self Worth](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Km7D1y6Ya40&list=PLqRe68z8v3vJMqv5M43cHXLhENHDAzGTz)," featuring powerhouses like Viola Davis, Kate Winslet, and Jane Fonda.
Another great source of inspiration is this interactive, [personalized video maker](https://www.messimessages.com/py/index.html) made in partnership with Lays.

Consistent branding and messaging can sweeten your revenue by [10-20%](https://www.marq.com/blog/brand-consistency-competitive-advantage), but only 30% of brands have well-known and accessible brand guides in their marketing strategy.
